# Supported versions

We are continuously releasing new versions of the Intercom iOS SDK with bug fixes and new features. We encourage all customers to keep up to date with the latest version. A list of all our release can be found on our [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/intercom/intercom-ios/releases) page

Note: In 2020 we announced the deprecation of SDK versions 5 and below, with the intention that they would no longer function after June 2021. Based on usage trends and feedback, we've decided not to disable those SDKs. Those versions will continue to work but are unsupported, and we encourage you to upgrade to the latest SDKs to take advantage of new features and bug fixes.
